phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si visita il sottomarino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see vee-SEE-tah eel sot-toh-mah-REE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per il sottomarino.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EEL soht-toh-mah-REE-noh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the submarine.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the submarine.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EEL soht-toh-mah-REE-noh
responses.french: Segua le indicazioni per il sottomarino.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah eel bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si acquista il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see ah-KWEE-stah eel bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh
